debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
⊢ |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|

      _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by
            simp [Finset.mul_sum, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]

have hle : ∀ i : Fin n, |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by
      intro i
      have := hdiff i
      simpa [abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
    have hx : ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y) = x := by
      simp
    have hg0 : g' 0 = ∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x := by
      simp [g', GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv, hx]
    rw [hg0]
    have habs :
        |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| ≤ ∑ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| :=
      Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
    have hterm :
        (∑ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|) ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by
      calc
        (∑ i, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|)
            = ∑ i, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by
                refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
                intro i hi
                simp [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
              refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
              intro i hi
              have := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (hle i) (abs_nonneg (nth_partial i f x))
              simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
        _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by
              simp [Finset.mul_sum, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    exact le_trans habs hterm
